case_title: GLEN VAHJEN ET AL VS. AIRBNB, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VAHJEN, GLEN VAHJEN, SHANE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. $1,857.80 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,857.80, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF VERSUS DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SC-109 AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR BRYAN WIDRO FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM BRYAN WIDRO FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM SEE CANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM BRYAN WIDRO FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON DEC 18, 2025. SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO SHANE VAHJEN RETURN TO SENDER - NOT AT THIS ADDRESS - NO FORWARD STICKER.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM APPROVED BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-15-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-04-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 TO ALLOW PARTIES TO CONTINUE FURTHER SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS. PLAINTIFF GLEN VAHJEN APPEARED, VIA ZOOM. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SHANE VAHJEN. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. COURT AUTHORIZES ZOOM APPPEARANCE FOR SHANE VAHJEN. PLAINTIFFS' EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF TO NOV-04-2025 AT 1:30PM; PLAINTIFF SHANE VAHJEN AUTHORIZED TO APPEAR VIA ZOOM.
REMARK:RECEIVED RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO SHANE VAHJEN. RETIRN TO SENDER, NOT AT THIS ADDRESS.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,725.80 FILED BY VAHJEN, GLEN VAHJEN, SHANE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-15-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
